30: Be it known that to kill a werewolf requires a special craft - one made of silver...
31: The magic item that will restore peace amongst the people lieth far below on another level...  Many perils stand betwixt thou and that item...  Many twisty mazes...  Many UPS and DOWNS...
32: Legend has it that killing vampires is extremely difficult.  It takes the correct weapon, one that has been carefully crafted of the finest wood...
33: You are having difficuly making out the passage:
..."roots dissolve when exposed to sea water..."
59: The following is a brief list of known potions and spells found in the land. Report compiled by Wizards local 345.

Scroll of Anti-Magic: Removes your magical spells! Scroll of Endurance: Increases your hit points Scroll of Doorways: Allows you to create a doorway thru solid rock! Scroll of the Mummy: Teleports you to the Mummy's tomb..

Skill potion: Increases your skill with your currently readied weapon, until you READY again. Vorpal potion: Increases your damage with your currently readied weapon, until you READY again. Charm potion: Will automatically charm any monster in current room. This monster will automatically ask to join you when you leave.
61: Be it known, that in older days, the sign of a true WEALTHY adventurer was the accumulation of 5,000 gold pieces...  It is said that without at least this amount of gold, one could not leave the LAND!
Be also aware of a holy object for the knights of old...
62: The novice adventurer should take these words to heart:
1)  Eat and drink often enough to keep thy health up!

2)  READY a weapon before encountering the demon! 3)  Shields are of little value unless put to use! 4)  Armor carried is armor wasted! 5)  Mapping thy journey saves time & lives! 6)  Acquisitions made in haste can prove hazardous to your health! 7)  Choose thy weapons well for the strongest may not always be the most effective.
....."courtesy of The Adventurer's Widows & Orpans Funds"
69: For a FAST ride, enter this when asked: 10-14-97
75: Ye must leave this terrible land at

once. Even though parts may seem fair and beautiful, yet it is ruled by the KING OF THE RINGWRAITHS! It is from this kingdom, that his cronies, the lessor Ringwraiths prowl the other realms of Spur, seeking helpless souls upon wich to feed. They roam freely in this wretched land....

Yet, if thee should prove to be the long awaited champion of the people, ye may yet stand a chance of killing the foul king, and rid Spur forever from the tranny of the Ringwraiths. For this, your reward will be great indeed!
But you have long roads in front of you.
77: Ye weary traveler risks much in thy journies. Rejoice now, for the author will inform ye of a great and powerful object that will be of great use to ye. It is the Amulet of Life. It is not easy to get, for it resides on a tiny deserted
island in the vast reaches of the western ocean. Deserted that is, except for it's guardian, one of the dreaded X-Dragons..

Once ye have gotten the Amulet of Life, ye must energize it by drinking of the Fountain of Youth. Only than, will its powers be awakened. It will actully snatch the weary traveller from the very jaws of death, and teleport him/her to safty. It is also the enemy of the Amulet of Death, affording a measure of protection for one who attempts to ready that dreaded weapon..
79: Besides the minor islands of the Great Ocean, there are 2 known big islands. These are the Isle of the Headhunters, and the Great Island of the Ringwraiths.
The Island of the Ringwraiths, is near the top of the world, and it is VERY cold there. One is advised to bring a COAT along! The King of the Wraiths is said to have his castle somewhere there..

About the Isle of the Headhunters, little is known except there is a rumor that the Chief of the Headhunters has a hidden treasure room. It is said that he hides the only item in the land capable of killing the King of the Ringwraiths, witha a single blow. Apparently the two villians have a pact of some sort...
84: Listen now my reader, as I tell ye of the most dreaded weapon in all the land. It is the Death Amulet. Almost as feared by the person wielding it, as the monster attacked by it. Rumored to lie at the head of a vast underground river
somewhere on the 2nd level. To get there, ye must first secure a boat of some sort.
Be aware also, that there is another Amulet in a distant land that affords some measure of protection for the wielder of the Death Amulet.
85: Warning! This document only to be read by Adepts of the Black Arts.
Here in contains all known knowledge of the Death Amulet. Otherwise known as
the Dark Force in some less learned circles.
It is said to reside at the headwaters of an underground river in what is known as the Level Of The Second. This is disputed by some scholars, but is generally accepted as being correct.

If one tries to READY the Death Amulet, there is a 20% chance if dying immediatly (30% in duel)! However, if one also carries the Amulet of Life the risk is reduced to 10% and 15% respectively. Furthermore, if one has the Amulet of Life properly energized, one will be resurrected even if one should die at the hands of the Death Amulet. (note that the Author does not pretend to be an expert on the Amulet of Life, such study being outside the realm of the Brotherhood of the Black Arts).

Once one has the Death Amulet readied, it manifests itself in this realm, as a Proximity weapon of 50 base damage! Again note that it's nemesis, the Amulet of Life will reduce this to 15 if one attacks another in Duel who has that Amulet. (10 if one has the Amulet of LIfe, and challanges another who has the Death Amulet.)
Further study on this subject, is only possible first hand...
88: By reading these magical arcane words, you feel all your spells vanish as if you never knew them....
89: By reading these magical arcane words, you feel some hit points return!
90: By reading these magical arcane words, you are endowed with the power to open a doorway thru the very walls in front of you. Choose carefully, the doorway to open...
91: As you read these ancient magical words, you feel a long dead person tugging at your very being. Even as you read, you are de-materialized an transported to another realm. One not very friendly... The Mummy's Tomb..
92: As you read these ancient magical words, you feel some hit points return..
95: A voice roars in your ear, "I BET YOU THOUGHT THIS WAS A MAP OF LEVEL TWO! WELL, IT AIN'T!!! HARRR HARRR HARRR!!! ONLY RANGERS OR THOSE WITH THE PALINTAR CAN VIEW SUCH A MAP!!'
125: The end is near. The ships computer has baffled even our science officer, and

thwarted all attempts to regain control of the ship. I fear that we in the barricaded Bridge are the only surviving humans left on board. I do not count the radiated humans under mind-control of the computer among our company. Let it be known that I, Captian Uzaris, Commander of the United Federation Starship Starburst, do hearby award commendations to the entire crew. Let it be so recorded, and their families rewarded accordingly. I must end now, they are reporting sounds of heavy Maulers approaching the door of the Bridge. We must all take part in the final defense.....
136: To the Space Scouts of Alpha-Centauri, always remember the Space Scouts motto:
'X' here, 'X' there, 'X' everwhere, makes a Scout healthy and wise...
